functions.name: add_user_to_group
functions.description: Add a specific user to a group.

functions.name: get_application_permissions_map
functions.description:
Returns a list of applications and the Entra ID groups required to access them.
Use this tool when a user asks for access to a specific software or platform
to identify which group_id should be used with add_user_to_group.

functions.name: get_user_groups
functions.description: List all groups for a user.

functions.name: lookup_user
functions.description: Find a user in Entra ID using their email or display name.

functions.name: manage_group
functions.description: Create a Security or M365 group and optionally enable Teams.
